title: Advertising and Promotions Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate advertising policies and programs or produce collateral materials, such as posters, contests, coupons, or giveaways, to create extra interest in the purchase of a product or service for a department, an entire organization, or on an account basis.

tasks.text: Plan and prepare advertising and promotional material to increase sales of products or services, working with customers, company officials, sales departments, and advertising agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect layouts and advertising copy, and edit scripts, audio, video, and other promotional material for adherence to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with department heads or staff to discuss topics such as contracts, selection of advertising media, or product to be advertised.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate with the media to disseminate advertising.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate activities of departments, such as sales, graphic arts, media, finance, and research.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and execute advertising policies and strategies for organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct, motivate, and monitor the mobilization of a campaign team to advance campaign goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare budgets and submit estimates for program costs as part of campaign plan development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contact organizations to explain services and facilities offered.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and analyze sales promotion results to determine cost effectiveness of promotion campaigns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify and develop contacts for promotional campaigns and industry programs that meet identified buyer targets, such as dealers, distributors, or consumers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Track program budgets, expenses, and campaign response rates to evaluate each campaign, based on program objectives and industry norms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Read trade journals and professional literature to stay informed on trends, innovations, and changes that affect media planning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage sales team, including setting goals, providing incentives, and evaluating employee performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and negotiate advertising and sales contracts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Formulate plans to extend business with established accounts and to transact business as agent for advertising accounts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train and direct workers engaged in developing and producing advertisements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble and communicate with a strong, diverse coalition of organizations or public figures, securing their cooperation, support, and action, to further campaign goals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide presentation and product demonstration support during the introduction of new products and services to field staff and customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Represent company at trade association meetings to promote products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate product research and development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze marketing or sales trends to forecast future conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze the effectiveness of marketing tactics or channels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Attend or participate in conferences, community events, and promotional events related to products or technologies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research on consumer opinions and buying habits, and identify target audiences for products, services, or technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate with marketing team members, graphic artists, and other workers to develop and implement marketing programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop communications materials, advertisements, presentations, or public relations initiatives to promote awareness of products and services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop comprehensive marketing strategies, using knowledge of products and technologies, markets, and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Devise or evaluate methods and procedures for collecting data, such as surveys, opinion polls, and questionnaires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain portfolios of marketing campaigns, strategies, and other marketing products or ideas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
